project.name: psyflow
project.description: A utility package for building modular PsychoPy experiments.

summary: Restored `TaskSettings.add_subinfo()` to fall back to `./outputs/human` when `save_path` is unset or empty, while still creating explicit nested output directories.
Added pure-Python regression tests for `psyflow.sim.loader`, `psyflow.sim.logging`, `psyflow.utils.trials`, and `TaskSettings.add_subinfo()`.
